channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Raymond Gutierrez considers BL project and possible acting comeback
item.description: Raymond Gutierrez, the popular Filipino actor and host, has expressed openness to participating in a Boy's Love (BL) project and potentially making a comeback in the entertainment industry. The news c...

item.title: Koeberg nuclear plant confirms minor radioactive incidents were safely contained
item.description: South Africa's sole nuclear power station, Koeberg, experienced four minor radioactive contamination incidents during scheduled maintenance work. Electricity Minister Kgosientsho Ramokgopa and Eskom o...

item.title: Ad Hoc Committee Chair Lekganyane defends draft report findings amid criticism
item.description: The Ad Hoc Committee Chair, Soviet Lekganyane, has dismissed social media reports alleging the committee's draft findings exonerated individuals, calling them premature and gullible. The committee, in...

item.title: Former Gangster Transforms into Successful Landlord Thanks to Support
item.description: Mike Sonko, former Nairobi governor, has celebrated Abdul Noor Mohammed (Jawe), a former gangster who transformed his life into becoming a landlord and property owner. During a ceremony, Sonko handed ...

item.title: Tanzania News Update: July 19, 2026
item.description: The article appears to be a template or placeholder for a news publication, likely from Tanzania Insight. While the content is incomplete, it references various categories such as politics, society, b...

item.title: Intermittent Fasting May Aid Long-Term Weight Management
item.description: A 12-week intermittent fasting program demonstrated sustained weight loss benefits for up to a year after the intervention ended, according to a study by the University of Granada published in Clinica...

item.title: A Review of Abdulrazak Gurnah's 'Admiring Silence': Exploring Postcolonial Themes and Identity
item.description: The article reviews Abdulrazak Gurnah's novel 'Admiring Silence,' published in 1996, which delves into themes of displacement, postcolonial identity, and the complexities of cultural assimilation. The...

item.title: Australians Dominate Letran in Opening Match of Shakey's Collegiate Volleyball Tournament
item.description: The Australian volleyball team delivered a commanding performance, sweeping Letran in straight sets to secure their opening victory at the Shakey's Collegiate National Invitationals. The match, held o...

item.title: Canberra to Investigate Commodity Price Fluctuations
item.description: The article discusses the need for Canberra to initiate an inquiry into commodity price volatility, referencing a anecdote from Joe Lowry's past experience in setting lithium prices without logical ju...

item.description: Labour's deputy leader, Lucy Powell, has stated that Andy Burnham will uphold the promises outlined in the 2024 Labour manifesto while adopting a more assertive approach to address economic challenges...

item.title: Europe’s Heat Waves Are Reshaping the Debate Over Air Conditioning and Public Safety
item.description: This editorial examines how repeated and increasingly severe heat waves across France and western Europe are forcing governments and the public to reconsider the role of air conditioning as a public h...

item.title: DOGE's Legacy: Inside the Secret Team Behind Trump's Government Initiatives
item.description: The article explores the lingering influence of Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) within the Trump administration, now rebranded as the National Design Studio. Despite its promise...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh adopts Uniform Civil Code ensuring equal rights in marriage, inheritance, and live-in relationships
item.description: The Madhya Pradesh cabinet has approved the Uniform Civil Code (UCC), introducing legal reforms to ensure equal rights in marriage, property inheritance, and live-in relationships. The new law mandate...

item.title: PNP strengthens safety protocols after fatal motorcycle taxi attacks
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) is collaborating with ride-hailing companies and agencies to enhance safety measures for motorcycle taxi riders following two recent fatal attacks. In an interview...

item.title: Anne Robinson Relocates to London for Family Reasons After 40 Years in Cotswolds
item.description: Anne Robinson, the renowned British television presenter and former host of 'The Weakest Link' and 'Countdown,' has decided to move from her Grade II-listed converted barn in the Cotswolds to London. ...

item.title: Mbappe Surpasses Messi to Become World Cup's Leading Goal Scorer
item.description: Kylian Mbappe, the French striker, has made history by becoming the all-time top scorer in FIFA World Cup history with 22 goals. This achievement came after he scored twice in France's 6-4 defeat agai...

item.title: Teenager's Death Highlights Peer Pressure and Stranger Safety Concerns
item.description: A grieving mother in Kenya has recounted the tragic death of her only daughter, who died hours after a visit from an old friend. The incident unfolded when the teenager, persuaded by her friend to app...

item.title: Lemon Cake Loaf Recipe: Achieving Moist Texture with Simple Ingredients
item.description: This article presents a detailed recipe for a lemon cake loaf that remains moist and flavorful. The key ingredients include fresh lemon zest, buttermilk, and a warm lemon syrup to lock in moisture. Th...

item.title: Messi's Popularity vs. Argentina's Controversies at World Cup 2026
item.description: The article discusses the paradox of Lionel Messi's global adoration versus the distrust surrounding the Argentina national team during the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Despite Messi's legendary status, his t...

item.title: Downtown Condo Sells Quickly at Near Asking Price Due to Turnkey Condition
item.description: A downtown Toronto condo unit sold swiftly at nearly its asking price, attributed to its turnkey condition. The one-bedroom-plus-den property, located at 111 Elizabeth St., No. 717, was priced at $518...
